title: Fix adv_status visibility memo stale deleted change entries

tasks.title: Add failing regression coverage for same-session adv_status after change deletion/removal or terminal visibility invalidation.
tasks.verification: Added regression coverage for terminal summaries in ChangeSummaryMemo and implemented active-fast-path filtering so archived/closed memo entries cannot pin deleted/terminal changes in same-session status/list output. Focused memo tests pass.
tasks.summary: Added regression coverage for terminal summaries in ChangeSummaryMemo and implemented active-fast-path filtering so archived/closed memo entries cannot pin deleted/terminal changes in same-session status/list output. Focused memo tests pass.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added regression coverage for terminal summaries in ChangeSummaryMemo and implemented active-fast-path filtering so archived/closed memo entries cannot pin deleted/terminal changes in same-session status/list output. Focused memo tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement scoped visibility memo invalidation/reconciliation for deleted/archived/closed change entries.
tasks.verification: Implemented scoped memo reconciliation in listResolvedChanges: default active-list fast path filters memo summaries to non-terminal statuses before returning, so archived/closed entries no longer remain visible until session restart. Terminal-inclusive list calls still take slow path and can include archive/closed data when explicitly requested.
tasks.summary: Implemented scoped memo reconciliation in listResolvedChanges: default active-list fast path filters memo summaries to non-terminal statuses before returning, so archived/closed entries no longer remain visible until session restart. Terminal-inclusive list calls still take slow path and can include archive/closed data when explicitly requested.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented scoped memo reconciliation in listResolvedChanges: default active-list fast path filters memo summaries to non-terminal statuses before returning, so archived/closed entries no longer remain visible until session restart. Terminal-inclusive list calls still take slow path and can include archive/closed data when explicitly requested.

tasks.title: Run focused status/cache tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: Verification passed. Focused status/cache tests passed (38 tests). pnpm run check passed (typecheck, check-test-isolation, lint, format:check). Live current session may require plugin reload/rebuild before live adv_status uses changed source.
tasks.summary: Verification passed. Focused status/cache tests passed (38 tests). pnpm run check passed (typecheck, check-test-isolation, lint, format:check). Live current session may require plugin reload/rebuild before live adv_status uses changed source.
tasks.implementation_summary: Verification passed. Focused status/cache tests passed (38 tests). pnpm run check passed (typecheck, check-test-isolation, lint, format:check). Live current session may require plugin reload/rebuild before live adv_status uses changed source.

wisdom.content: Status/list memo fast paths must exclude terminal summaries unless caller explicitly requests terminal statuses. Keep archived/closed reads on slow path so visibility/disk/archive sources can reconcile true terminal state without pinning same-session active lists.

proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #57, proposal, project context, and cache-invalidation wisdom. This is a status cache invalidation bug; no HITL tradeoff/conflict detected.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan adds same-session stale-entry regression and scoped visibility memo invalidation/reconciliation.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #57.

execution.approval_evidence: All 3 tasks done: regression coverage for terminal summaries in ChangeSummaryMemo, scoped active-fast-path filtering for memo entries, and verification (38 tests passed, pnpm run check passed).

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
